case_title: DARRELL FORD VS. ALEXANDRIA RANSOM ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO TOMAS REYES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 AT 3:30 PM. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT DEFENDANT ALEXANDRIA RANSOM HAS ASSUMED FULL RESPONSIBILITY FOR CAUSING THIS ACCIDENT. THEREFORE, DEFENDANT TOMAS REYES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED AUG-10-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, TOMAS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD, DARRELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED AUG-10-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, ALEXANDRIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, ALEXANDRIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DARREL FORD. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS ALEXANDRIA RANSOM & TOMAS REYES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FORD, DARRELL AS TO DEFENDANT RANSOM, ALEXANDRIA REYES, TOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD, DARRELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANSOM, ALEXANDRIA $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,800.00, PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED THAT DEFENDANT ALEXANDRIA RANSOM HAS ASSUMED FULL RESPONSIBILITY FOR CAUSING THIS ACCIDENT. THEREFORE, DEFENDANT TOMAS REYES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO ALEXANDRIA RANSOM ON 9/27/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
